title: The method of reducing data redundancy using a randomization procedure
author: Lazarovych, Ihor
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This paper proposes a method for reducing data redundancy using a randomization procedure. The method can be effectively applied before transmitting or storing information in automation systems in various fields of communication systems and networks.
steps_raw: This paper proposes a method for reducing data redundancy using a randomization procedure. The method can be effectively applied before transmitting or storing information in automation systems in various fields of communication systems and networks.
